title: Artifact Metadata
description: Canonical metadata record that every governed artifact must carry. Emitted by the artifact_emitter helper and stored alongside the artifact.

artifact_id.description: Stable unique identifier for the artifact instance.

artifact_type.description: Canonical artifact type name (e.g. evaluation_manifest, work_item, run_manifest).

module_origin.description: Module or engine that produced this artifact (e.g. spectrum-pipeline-engine).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this artifact was created.

lifecycle_state.description: Current lifecycle state of the artifact.

contract_version.description: Version of the contract governing this artifact type.

run_id.description: Optional run identifier correlating this artifact to a pipeline run.
